Cost / Earned Value weighted scope units

Cost trajectory against the earned value basis. WBS breakdown shows which work areas drive spend.

NOTE — Weighted Units: Default schedule uses normalized scope-weight units (cost_per_qty = 1.0), not currency. Total project weight = 10,000 units in default data. Multiply by your contract value per unit to convert to monetary terms.

BCWS (Planned) · ACWP (Actual) · EAC (Forecast at completion)
